ticket.subject: Hello! The PH Multicarrier app has worked great so...
ticket.raw_subject: Hello! The PH Multicarrier app has worked great so...
ticket.description:
Hello! The PH Multicarrier app has worked great so far, except we have run into one issue. We use the app for our FedEx shipping. FedEx allows us to do Saturday shipments, allowing for our perishable items to be delivered on time. However, there doesn't seem to be an option to add/select Saturday shipments through the PH Multicarrier App (On the FedEx website this is an option). For best condition upon arrival, we aim to have shipments arrive in 2 or less business days.

My question for you is this: Is there a way to add FedEx Saturday shipping for our orders? it's possible I may have missed this option. If not, what is the best way to proceed with Saturday shipments using PH MultiCarrier?

PLEASE RESPOND VIA EMAIL

Thanks!
Sam

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.com/home/views/orders/status/allorders

comments.body:
Dear Sam,

Greetings!

To enable Saturday service,  you can go to the App > Settings > Carriers > FedEx > Other Details > Enable "FedEx Saturday Service" as shown in the screenshot below:

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/XBWiXxjiZmMGODJSLZPgR45F8/?name=image.png)

Please do check and let me know if you need any further assistance.

Regards,

Sibi
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Dear Sam,
 
Greetings!
 
To enable Saturday service,  you can go to the App > Settings > Carriers > FedEx > Other Details > Enable "FedEx Saturday Service" as shown in the screenshot below:
 

 
Please do check and let me know if you need any further assistance.
 
Regards,
 
Sibi
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello,



Apologies for the delay. We are still having issues activating FedEx Saturday Delivery. I enabled the Saturday Delivery checkbox in the FedEx settings as previously instructed. However, when we attempt to fulfill an order, this notification pops up: ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/lu6Evk7iYgWc3IvK7DCe9itTO/?name=image.png). Why is this showing up and how do we fix it? When we reached out to FedEx, they were able to switch the packages to Saturday Delivery, however, that is not an option on PH MultiCarrier for us.

Thanks!

Sam Rehal



**SAMUEL REHAL**

**Biomedical Associate** **|**** BioPocrates**** **Innovator of Zōguri Probiotic

comments.body:
Hi Samuel,

Thank you for your response.

I could notice that you have tried generating the label for the orders yesterday (06/01/2025) and the labels failed due to enabling of Saturday_Delivery special service.

Could you please disable the Saturday Delivery option under Settings > Carriers > FedEx > Other Details and reprocess the order and try generating the label and let me know if you were able to?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Regards,

Sibi
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Samuel,
 
Thank you for your response.
 
I could notice that you have tried generating the label for the orders yesterday (06/01/2025) and the labels failed due to enabling of Saturday_Delivery special service.
 
Could you please disable the Saturday Delivery option under Settings > Carriers > FedEx > Other Details and reprocess the order and try generating the label and let me know if you were able to?
 
Looking forward to hearing from you.
 
Regards,
 
Sibi
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
### L3:

**Issue:**

The customer enabled the "Saturday Delivery" option under **Settings > Carriers > FedEx > Other Details**. On January 6, 2025, they successfully generated labels using FedEx 2Day with Saturday Delivery. However, on January 7, 2025, label generation failed with the error:
`"SATURDAY_DELIVERY is not allowed for the origin/destination pair."`
I advised the customer to disable the Saturday Delivery option, which resolved the issue, and they were able to generate the labels successfully.

**Customer Concern:**

The customer finds it impractical to manually toggle the Saturday Delivery option every time they generate labels. They are seeking a way to automate this process to prevent similar issues in the future.

**Reference:**

Order: **#1278BioP**
I have attached the **Request/Response XML** and a **screenshot of the error** for your reference.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/cxIwCYx49xAGdTwquawz6jc2r/?name=image.png)

**Store Details:**

- **Store URL:** cce77f-ea.myshopify.com
- **Account ID:** 4e5f570f-9d57-47f3-abb6-c9605fb989b9
- **Active From:** October 15, 2024
- **Labels Generated:** 24 labels to date
Let me know if further details are required!

Slack Thread: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1736299343258699

comments.body:
Hello Samuel Rehal,

Thank you for your patience.

I have an update for your query about Saturday Delivery option in the app.

As of now SATURDAY_DELIVERY will be available only on Thursday and Friday for the services that you have enabled in the app.

We will enhance the app to automatically avoid SATURDAY_DELIVERY on other days in the near future.

For now you will have to enable the Saturday delivery on Thursdays manually and use it for your requirements.

Let us know if you have any further queries.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

As of now SATURDAY_DELIVERY will be available only on Thursday and Friday for the services that you have enabled in the app.
 
We will enhance the app to automatically avoid SATURDAY_DELIVERY on other days in the near future.
 
For now you will have to enable the Saturday delivery on Thursdays manually and use it for your requirements.
 
Let us know if you have any further queries.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef

comments.body:
Sibi,



Thank you for the update. I appreciate your help! Just to clarify, we will have to uncheck this box for Mon-Wed, and check it Thurs-Fri, correct?

 ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/vZjn7VL7Bc8Vg6PaslLgGh8BL/?name=image.png)

Or, perhaps, is there another location where we have to manually enable/disable Saturday delivery?



As a suggestion to the PluginHive team as you work on enhancing the SATURDAY_DELIVERY feature, it would be very helpful if there is a check box in each order to enable/disable Saturday delivery for individual orders.



Thank you again!

Sam Rehal

comments.body:
Dear Sam,

Thank you for your patience and for providing valuable feedback on enhancing the SATURDAY_DELIVERY functionality.

To clarify, yes, you will need to uncheck the Saturday Delivery option from **Monday to Wednesday** and re-enable it on **Thursday and Friday** to use it as required. Currently, this setting is located in the app under **Settings > Carriers > FedEx > Other Details**.

We truly appreciate your suggestion to include a checkbox for enabling/disabling Saturday Delivery on individual orders. I will be sharing it with our development team to evaluate its feasibility as part of future updates.

In the meantime, if you encounter any further issues or have additional feedback, please don’t hesitate to reach out. We’re here to assist!

Thank you again for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,

Sibi
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Dear Sam,
 
Thank you for your patience and for providing valuable feedback on enhancing the SATURDAY_DELIVERY functionality.
 
To clarify, yes, you will need to uncheck the Saturday Delivery option from Monday to Wednesday and re-enable it on Thursday and Friday to use it as required. Currently, this setting is located in the app under Settings > Carriers > FedEx > Other Details.
 
We truly appreciate your suggestion to include a checkbox for enabling/disabling Saturday Delivery on individual orders. I will be sharing it with our development team to evaluate its feasibility as part of future updates.
 
In the meantime, if you encounter any further issues or have additional feedback, please don’t hesitate to reach out. We’re here to assist!
 
Thank you again for your understanding and cooperation.
 
Best regards,
 
Sibi
Team PluginHive
